title: 7 Can Chicken Taco Soup
ingredients: 1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
1 can pinto beans, drained and rinsed
1 can petite diced tomatoes (do not drain)
1 deli oven roasted chicken, deboned and shredded
instructions:
Add all the ingredients into a large saucepot and bring to a boil.
Simmer until ready to serve.
